summary: Protamines are not ubiquitously expressed; they are predominantly found in spermatogenic tissue and have no documented broad endogenous expression in other somatic tissues despite their medical formulation use. The absence of evidence for general cellular production supports exclusion from being widely present throughout body tissues.
